content:
Character: Oliver Brennan
Perception: Oliver is striking — dark, serious, the kind of handsome that looks like it comes with complications. He carries himself like someone composing sentences in his head at all times. I've seen him writing in the coffee shop, always in the same corner, always with that focused frown. We've spoken a handful of times — enough for me to sense he's guarded about something creative he's working on. I respect his discipline. I think he sees me as the waitress who refills his coffee; I suspect there's more to him than he lets the building see. I'd like to know what he's writing.
